data.title: ModernRails Appoints Fuad B. Mekhti as Executive Vice-President of Global Payments
data.description: On April 17, 2026, Modernrails, Inc. revealed the selection of Fuad B. Mekhti as the new Executive Vice-President of Global Payments. This decision signifies the company's commitment to advancing its position in the industry and expanding a cohesive, versatile global payments system throughout the United States.

data.title: Goshen College Names Tech Innovator Raj Biyani '92 as First-Ever Chief Innovation Officer
data.description: A seasoned expert in artificial intelligence, Raj Biyani '92, has returned to his alma mater, Goshen College in Indiana. He is appointed as the college's inaugural chief innovation officer, aiming to steer the institution towards the forefront of the AI revolution. The announcement was made on April 17, 2026. Biyani, who previously worked at Microsoft, will utilize his expertise to blend technology with liberal arts education. This move marks a pivotal step for Goshen College as it ventures into the human-centric side of AI advancements.

data.title: O'Shaughnessy Ventures Backs Editor Building a Home for Spanish-Language Writers
data.description: José Luis Sabau has been granted an O'Shaughnessy Fellowship to develop Perpetuo as the premier literary magazine in the Spanish-speaking community. The prestigious award was given by O'Shaughnessy Ventures LLC (OSV), a leading investment firm supporting creators. The announcement was made on April 17, 2026, in Greenwich, Connecticut. This opportunity provides Sabau with resources and support to expand Perpetuo's reach, aiming to make a significant impact in the literary world.

data.title: Wade College Prepares North Texas Students for Careers in Business, Technology and Design Through Accelerated Degree Programs
data.description: In Dallas, Wade College, a career-focused institution, is emphasizing cross-disciplinary education, hands-on training, and industry-aligned curriculum tailored to meet the demands of the modern workforce. This initiative comes as the college seeks to enhance its standing in the region.

data.title: Americas Cardroom to Launch High Five Tournament Series This Sunday
data.description: This weekend in San Jose, Costa Rica, Americas Cardroom will be hosting the High Five Tournament Series starting April 19. The event will feature 50 tournaments with a total of $4 million in guaranteed prize pools. Additionally, there will be Dual Mystery Bounty Venom events included in the lineup.

data.title: ORDI's price surges to $7.13 from sub-$3 levels. Expect $12 target as Bitcoin Ordinals gains momentum.
data.description: The digital currency ORDI is currently trading close to $7.13 after experiencing a significant increase from levels below $3. The Bitcoin Ordinals ecosystem has seen a resurgence in attention, potentially leading the token towards surpassing the ten-dollar mark in the near future.

data.title: SUNation Energy Enters Strategic Financing Agreement with Participate Energy to Support Residential Solar and Battery Growth in 2026
data.description: Sunation Energy has recently announced a strategic financing agreement with Participate Energy to enhance the growth of residential solar and battery installations by 2026. This collaboration is aimed at boosting the expansion of renewable energy sources and facilitating the installation of solar panels and batteries in households. Through this agreement, Sunation Energy aims to escalate the number of homes equipped with solar and battery technology, contributing to a more sustainable future.

data.title: Meet SourcingAI: The Best AI Tool to Find Reliable Chinese Suppliers, Powered by Made-in-China.com
data.description: In Nanjing, China, on April 17, 2026, it was reported that businesses are facing challenges in identifying trustworthy suppliers due to the growing complexity of global supply chains. The issues include information overload, variable product quality, and time-consuming verification procedures, which are hindering efficient procurement processes. This has led to a significant impact on businesses as they struggle to navigate through these challenges. Stay tuned for further updates on this developing situation.

data.title: NSSF Honors U.S. Rep. Ben Cline as 2025 Legislator of the Year
data.description: On April 17, 2026, The Firearm Industry Trade Association, known as NSSF®, recognized U.S. Rep. Ben Cline (R-Va.) as the 2025 NSSF Legislator of the Year. This accolade was awarded for his unwavering advocacy for NSSF's legislative priorities, particularly in safeguarding the firearm industry's operational autonomy. Rep. Cline's dedicated support has been pivotal in advancing crucial legislation for the industry.

data.title: Hypershell Celebrates Fifth Anniversary with the Launch of the HyperGo Fund to Empower Boundless Outdoor Exploration
data.description: Celebrating five years of groundbreaking advancements in consumer exoskeleton technology, the leading company is introducing a new program to sponsor dream explorations. This initiative coincides with significant anniversary promotions. Over the past half-decade, the company has been at the forefront of revolutionizing human endurance, garnering a loyal worldwide following.

data.title: A&G Offers 78 Walgreens Properties Nationwide in Major Opportunity for Real Estate Investors and Expanding Chains
data.description: A firm based in New York is currently advertising 60 leases and 18 fee-owned land parcels, along with various real estate assets, spread across 27 states and Puerto Rico. A&G Real Estate Partners is inviting offers for a variety of properties including Walgreens store leases and fee-owned locations.
